user.title: HA Energy Agent — AI Provider
user.description: Select your AI provider and enter the corresponding API key.

discover.title: Discovering energy entities

grid_type.title: Grid power measurement
grid_type.description:
How does your installation measure grid power?

**Separate sensors** — you have individual import and export power sensors.
**Combined P1 meter** — one sensor reports net power (positive = import, negative = export).

sensor_review.title: Assign sensor slots
sensor_review.description: All slots are optional — leave empty what you don't have. Discovery has pre-filled its best guesses.

data_description.grid_power_import: Current power drawn from the grid (W)
data_description.grid_power_export: Current power fed back to the grid (W)
data_description.grid_power_net: Net grid power from P1 meter — positive = import from grid, negative = export to grid (W)
data_description.grid_energy_import: Total energy imported from the grid today (kWh)
data_description.grid_energy_export: Total energy exported to the grid today (kWh)

data.notify_ha: Send analysis results as HA notifications

error.invalid_anthropic_key: Anthropic API key must start with 'sk-ant-'. Please check and try again.
error.invalid_openai_key: OpenAI API key must start with 'sk-'. Please check and try again.
